concerns.text: FR-014 mandates validating distal CRE-Gene pairs via 'motif overlap or chromatin looping' and excluding those without. However, the statistical model (FR-005) treats all included pairs as binary valid/invalid. The prior kickback concern noted that weak motif matches passing the filter introduce noise. The spec fails to define how the *strength* of the validation (e.g., motif score, loop contact frequency) is incorporated into the model (e.g., as a weight) or if a stricter threshold is applied. Without this, the predictor variable remains noisy, potentially invalidating the claim of 'significant fraction of variance explained' (US-2).
